chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُسْلِمِ يَقْتُلُ الذِّمِّيَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الذِّمِّيِّ يَقْتُلُ الْمُسْلِمَ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ أَوْ يَقْتَصُّ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضاً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 25 – The Muslim kills the Zimmy or injures him, and the Zimmy kills the Muslim or injures him, or they retaliate against each other

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمُسْلِمِ هَلْ يُقْتَلُ بِأَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ قَالَ لَا إِلَّا أَنْ يَكُونَ مُعَوَّداً لِقَتْلِهِمْ فَيُقْتَلُ وَ هُوَ صَاغِرٌ .

en.hubeali: Humeyd Bin Ziyad, from Al Hassan Bin Muhammad Bin Sama’at, from Ahmad Bin Al Hassan Al Maysami, from Aban, from Ismail Bin Al Fazl who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the Muslim, would he be killed due to the Zimmy people?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, except if he happens to be habitual of killing them, so he would be killed, and he would be belittled’.
